question.label: Concrete path
question.name: What concrete path forward feels real to you right now?
question.description: Gets him to name the route he actually believes in, rather than an abstract aspiration.

answer: I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.

assessment.note: He sees a path in owning bigger direction but names a clear absence of authority, signaling strong role-clarity deficit and mild growth blockage. [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'real authority' should be unpacked next session.

new_queue.label: Next step from me
new_queue.name: What support from me would make the biggest difference in the next couple of weeks?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
I want clearer criteria, not reassurance.
I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.
